title: Interactive Storybook Book Schema (V5 - Localization Engine)
description: Schema for a complete, multi-scene interactive storybook, redesigned for AI-driven mass production using Component & Event-Driven DSL, with Two-Stage Compilation, Late-Binding, Global Blackboard, and Three-Tier Localization Override Architecture.

metadata.description: Global metadata for the entire book.

title.description: Book title. (e.g., 'The Little Prince and the Fox')

author.description: Author of the book. (e.g., 'Antoine de Saint-Exupéry')

description.description: Brief description or synopsis of the book.

cover_image.description: Static path to the book's cover image or Semantic Asset URN. For dynamic generation, use 'cover_provider'.

cover_provider.description: JIT AIGC provider for cover image, for dynamic generation.

global_ui_config.description: Global UI/UX configurations for the entire book.

font_family.description: Primary font family for the book (e.g., 'Nunito', 'Playfair Display').

theme_color.description: Primary theme color (hex code or CSS variable name).

initial_state.description: Initial global state for the story (Global Blackboard). Can be used for inventory, metrics, flags etc. Supports variable interpolation in default values.

metrics.description: Numeric metrics for the user's progress or performance.

flags.description: Boolean flags for key story events or choices.

locale_manifests.description: Asset patch packages for each supported locale. Maps locale codes to asset override dictionaries.

additionalProperties.description: Asset override dictionary for a specific locale. Keys are Semantic Asset URNs, values are override configurations.

url.description: Actual asset URL for this locale.

hitbox.description: Optional: Override hitbox/collision area for this asset.

config_overrides.description: Optional: Additional config overrides for this asset.

scenes.description: Array of individual scenes (stages) that make up the book.

scene_id.description: Unique identifier for this specific scene. (e.g., 'scene_desert_fox_intro')

order.description: The sequential order of the scene in the book. (e.g., 1, 2, 3)

render_conditions.description: Conditions for rendering this scene. Can be used to exclude scenes for certain locales.

exclude_locales.description: Array of locale codes for which this scene should be skipped.

include_locales.description: Array of locale codes for which this scene should be included (if specified, only these locales will render this scene).

elements.description: Array of atomic UI components and plugins on this stage.

id.description: Unique identifier for the element within this scene.

config.description: Element-specific configuration (e.g., image src, text content, plugin parameters). Supports variable interpolation like '{{user.name}}'.

src.description: Semantic Asset URN (e.g., 'urn:asset:magical_forest?season=summer&mood={{user.mood}}') or static asset path. Engine resolves URN based on current locale and locale_manifests.

text.description: Text content (default locale). Supports variable interpolation. For multi-locale text, use 'text_variants'.

text_variants.description: Locale-specific text overrides. Keys are locale codes, values are text strings.

word_timings.description: Word-level timestamp array for karaoke-style highlighting (default locale). For multi-locale timings, use 'word_timings_variants'.

word_timings_variants.description: Locale-specific word_timings overrides. Keys are locale codes, values are word_timings arrays.

variants.description: Locale-specific deep overrides for this element. Keys are locale codes (e.g., 'locale:ar-SA'), values are partial element configurations that will deep-merge with the base config.

additionalProperties.description: Partial element configuration for a specific locale.

provider.description: JIT (Just-In-Time) AIGC provider for dynamic content generation.

endpoint.description: Backend API endpoint for AIGC service.

payload.description: Payload for AIGC service, may contain 'intent' and current state data. Supports variable interpolation.

states.description: Fallback and loading states for JIT AIGC.

events.description: Array of ECA (Event-Condition-Action) rules for this scene.

source_id.description: ID of the element or plugin emitting the event. Supports variable interpolation.

condition.description: Optional: Conditional logic to be met for the trigger to fire, uses AST-like structure.

conditions.description: Array of conditions (logical AST) that must be true for actions to execute.

verb.description: Operator (e.g., EQUALS, CONTAINS). Added GTE, LTE, HAS_TRAIT.

subject.description: Dynamic path to state (e.g., '$element.apple.current_pos.x', '$state.quiz.answer_input', '$story_state.metrics.bravery_score'). Supports variable interpolation.

target.description: Target value for comparison. Supports variable interpolation.

actions.description: Array of actions to execute when trigger and conditions are met.

target_id.description: ID of the element to apply the action to (if applicable). Supports variable interpolation.

value.description: Value to set for state changes, or animation/audio path. Supports variable interpolation.

to.description: Target scene_id for 'navigate' action. Supports variable interpolation.

operations.description: Array of state mutation operations for 'mutate_state' action.

event.description: Event name for 'emit_telemetry' action. Supports variable interpolation.

tags.description: Tags for 'emit_telemetry' action. Supports variable interpolation.

delay_ms.description: Delay in milliseconds before executing action.

transitions.description: Defines the routing logic from this scene to the next, based on current story state. Evaluated in order.

condition.description: Optional: Condition (logical AST) that must be true for this transition to occur. If null, always true.

target_scene.description: ID of the scene to navigate to if condition is met. Supports variable interpolation.

scene_state.description: Initial state for the scene's internal state machine, can be manipulated by actions. Supports variable interpolation.

global_context.description: Global context data available for variable interpolation across all scenes. Can be pre-filled or dynamically updated.
